CustomObject.description: DEBUG TOGGLE for the Guitar Academy demo. When the Enabled checkbox on the org-default record is ON, the on-page diagnostic panel (guitarSessionDebug — shows MessagingSession state, agent page context, guard status, and an event log) renders for logged-in users. Leave OFF for live demos. Reusable scaffolding — flip ON only while debugging. No deploy needed to toggle: edit the org-default value in Setup > Custom Settings > Guitar Debug Config > Manage.
CustomObject.label: Guitar Debug Config
